evidence_boundary.claim_rule: Results apply only to this synthetic offline workload and must not be presented as observed model-capability gains.
evidence_boundary.measures: orchestration retrieval contracts under explicit gold labels

metric_definitions.budget_violation_rate: Fraction whose final canonical context estimate exceeds budget_tokens.
metric_definitions.current_fact_recall: Mean fraction of current-fact IDs selected.
metric_definitions.dependency_recall: Mean fraction of required dependency IDs selected.
metric_definitions.determinism_rate: Fraction whose ordered IDs and token count match an immediate rerun.
metric_definitions.forbidden_inclusion_rate: Fraction of cases selecting at least one forbidden ID.
metric_definitions.forbidden_selected_fraction: Mean selected-set fraction carrying a forbidden label.
metric_definitions.paired_ci: Seeded paired percentile bootstrap 95% interval for reference minus comparator.
metric_definitions.precision: Mean fraction of selected IDs that are gold-relevant.
metric_definitions.recall_at_budget: Mean fraction of gold-relevant IDs selected under the content budget.

reproducibility.timing_note: Wall-clock latency is environment-dependent; selection outputs are fixed.

lexical_topk.description: Bag-of-words overlap ranking over raw history.
